name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title pledge loans and unsecured lines of credit to Memphis residents, accepting most credit types and allowing borrowers to keep their vehicles.
description_long:
TitleMax Memphis (Summer Avenue location) has operated since February 2007, serving the greater Memphis area with secured and unsecured lending solutions. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional credit-based lending by accepting vehicle titles as collateral, which they claim enables approval for consumers with varied credit histories. The Summer Avenue store is bilingual and located at 3190 Summer Avenue, one mile west of Highland Street across from AutoZone, with extended hours (9am-7pm most weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday).

The company offers three primary products: Title Pledges (secured loans using vehicle titles), Flex Lines of Credit (unsecured lines of credit), and In-Store/Online Personal Loans. For title pledges, borrowers need only a clear vehicle title, valid government ID, and the ability to keep driving their vehicle. Their unsecured line of credit requires a government-issued ID, recent bank statement showing recurring deposits (or proof of income), valid email/phone/SSN for online applications, and residence in one of ten qualifying states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI).

TitleMax distinguishes itself through same-day cash approval, competitive rates positioning, and staff expertise highlighted by overwhelmingly positive reviews (481 Google reviews at 5.0/5 stars). Individual staff members like Nicole are repeatedly mentioned for professionalism and taking time to educate customers about payment options and app usage. The company operates multiple nearby Memphis locations and emphasizes manageable payments and flexible withdrawal options for line of credit customers.

However, prospective borrowers should note that the website provides no actual APR, rate ranges, or fee information—critical details for assessing whether rates are truly competitive. The focus on title-secured lending means vehicle owners can face repossession risk if payments are missed. The unsecured personal loan product availability is state-restricted to ten states, limiting accessibility. No information is disclosed about loan amounts, repayment terms, or how vehicle value is assessed.
address: 211 W Camp Wisdom Rd, Duncanville, TX 75116

company_info.headquarters: 211 W Camp Wisdom Rd, Duncanville, TX 75116

pros: Same-day cash approval for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types; credit score not primary approval factor
Allows borrowers to keep driving their vehicle while using title as collateral
Offers flexible line of credit withdrawal options (lump sum or over time)
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended operating hours (open until 7pm weekdays, 9am Saturday)
Consistently high customer satisfaction (481 five-star Google reviews; staff praised by name)
cons: Website displays no APR, rate ranges, or fee schedule—impossible to verify 'competitive rates' claim
Title pledge loans carry repossession risk if payments are missed
Unsecured personal loans only available in 10 states; not available nationwide
No loan amount limits, repayment terms, or vehicle valuation methodology disclosed
Requires active bank account with recent statement or proof of income for unsecured products
best_for: Vehicle owners needing fast cash ($100-$1K+) who can use their car title as collateral
Consumers with poor or limited credit history unable to qualify for traditional personal loans
Borrowers in TN, MO, MS, SC, TX, AZ, DE, ID, KS, UT, or WI seeking flexible unsecured lines of credit
Individuals requiring emergency funds same-day without lengthy approval processes
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis-area vehicle owners with poor credit who need emergency cash quickly and can secure a loan with their car title. The critical caveat is that the company provides zero pricing transparency on its website—borrowers cannot verify claimed competitive rates before applying, and title-secured loans carry repossession risk if payments are missed.
services: Title pledges/title loans using vehicle title as collateral
Flex lines of credit (secured by vehicle title)
Unsecured flexible lines of credit (cash advances without collateral)
Online and in-store loan account management
Vehicle title loans with permission to keep driving vehicle
Line of credit with flexible withdrawal options (full amount or partial draws)
